basic_info.insurer_name: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited

coverage.room_rent_limit: 2% of Basic Sum Insured maximum of Rs.5,000/- per day for Rs.1,50,000; For Rs.3,00,000 to Rs.25,00,000: Up to Rs.5,000/- per day or Private Single A/c Room
coverage.icu_coverage: Covered under ICU Charges - includes ICU bed, general medical support services, monitoring devices, critical care nursing and intensivist charges

coverage_features.coverage_limit: 2% of Basic Sum Insured max Rs.5,000/- per day (for Rs.1,50,000 SI) or Private Single A/c Room (for higher SI)
coverage_features.coverage_details: Proportionate deduction applies to Associated Medical Expenses based on room rent eligibility
coverage_features.notes: Proportionate deductions not applied for hospitals without differential billing

coverage_features.feature_name: Surgeon, Anesthetist, Medical Practitioner, Consultants, Specialist Fees
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covered as part of hospitalization expenses
coverage_features.notes: Subject to proportionate deduction based on room rent

coverage_features.coverage_details: Covers Anesthesia, Blood, Oxygen, Operation Theatre charges, ICU charges, Surgical Appliances, Medicines and Drugs, Diagnostic materials, X-ray, Diagnostic Imaging, Dialysis, Chemotherapy, Radiotherapy, Pacemaker, stent
coverage_features.notes: Coronary stenting costs as per DPCO/NPPA Capping

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Rs.750 per hospitalization, overall limit Rs.1,500 per policy period
coverage_features.coverage_details: For private ambulance service when needed for medical reasons to go to hospital for treatment
coverage_features.notes: Payable only if there is an admissible claim under the policy

coverage_features.coverage_details: For the disease/illness, injury sustained following an admissible claim for hospitalization

coverage_features.coverage_limit: 60 days from date of discharge, max 7% of hospitalization expenses subject to Rs.5,000 per hospitalization
coverage_features.coverage_details: Calculated on nursing expenses, surgeon's/consultants fees, diagnostic charges and cost of drugs and medicines only

coverage_features.coverage_limit: 1% of average Basic Sum Insured subject to max Rs.5,000
coverage_features.coverage_details: Available for Basic Sum Insured of Rs.2,00,000 and above only. Payable after every block of 4 claim free years
coverage_features.notes: Payment does not form part of Basic Sum Insured

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Rs.12,000 per person per policy period (up to Rs.2 lakh SI); Rs.20,000 per eye max Rs.30,000 per person (Rs.3-5 lakh SI); Rs.30,000 per eye max Rs.40,000 per person (Rs.10-15 lakh SI)
coverage_features.coverage_details: Sub-limits vary based on sum insured

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Varies by treatment and sum insured
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covers Balloon Sinuplasty, Deep Brain Stimulation, Oral Chemotherapy, Immunotherapy-Monoclonal Antibody injections, Intra Vitreal injections, Uterine artery Embolization and HIFU, Stereotactic radio surgeries, Bronchical Thermoplasty, Vaporisation of prostate, IONM, Stem cell therapy for bone marrow transplant, Robotic surgeries
coverage_features.notes: Limits range from Rs.5,000 to Rs.5,00,000 depending on treatment and sum insured. Sublimits all inclusive with or without hospitalization

coverage_features.coverage_limit: 5% of basic sum insured for every claim free year, max 25%
coverage_features.coverage_details: Reduces at same rate if claim made. Calculated on lower of expiring or renewed SI

coverage_features.feature_name: Automatic Restoration of Basic Sum Insured
coverage_features.coverage_details: Available immediately upon exhaustion of limit of coverage. Can be used only for illness/disease unrelated to illness for which claim was made
coverage_features.notes: Cannot be carried forward. Not available for Modern Treatment

coverage_features.coverage_limit: 25% of Basic Sum Insured subject to max Rs.25,000 during entire policy period
coverage_features.coverage_details: In-patient hospitalization expenses for treatment by non-allopathic systems of medicine
All day care procedures are covered under this policy
coverage_features.notes: Treatment undertaken under anesthesia in less than 24 hours which would have otherwise required hospitalization of more than 24 hours

features.coverage_details: Enhanced room rent coverage compared to base plan

features.coverage_limit: Rs.1,500 for every claim free year (Rs.3-5 lakh SI); Rs.2,500 (Rs.10-15 lakh SI); Rs.5,000 (Rs.20-25 lakh SI)
features.coverage_details: Payable on renewal when renewed policy is in force
features.notes: Payment does not form part of Basic Sum Insured

features.coverage_limit: 25% in 2nd year, additional 20% for each subsequent year, max 100% overall
features.coverage_details: Enhanced bonus structure compared to base plan

features.coverage_limit: 100% additional Basic Sum Insured once if limit exhausted
features.coverage_details: Can be utilized even for illness/disease for which claim was made. Unutilized amount cannot be carried forward
Coverage for medical treatment (including AYUSH) exceeding 3 days at home when patient cannot be removed to hospital or room unavailable
features.notes: Excludes Asthma, Bronchitis, Chronic Nephritis, Diarrhoea, Diabetes, Epilepsy, Hypertension, Influenza, Cough & Cold, Psychiatric disorders, Pyrexia <10 days, Tonsillitis, URI, Arthritis, Gout, Rheumatism

features.coverage_details: In-patient hospitalization expenses for organ transplantation from donor to recipient insured person
features.notes: Donor screening expenses and post-donation complications not payable

features.coverage_limit: Rs.500 per day max Rs.3,000 per hospitalization (Rs.3-5 lakh SI); Rs.1,000 per day max Rs.6,000 per hospitalization (Rs.10-25 lakh SI)
features.coverage_details: Payable for each completed 24 hours if hospitalization exceeds 48 hours in shared accommodation at network hospital
features.notes: Date of admission/discharge not counted. ICU/HDU stay not counted. Does not form part of SI but impacts cumulative bonus

features.feature_name: Additional SI for Road Traffic Accident - Gold Plan
features.coverage_details: Available if insured was wearing helmet and riding/pillion on two-wheeler, evidenced by police and hospital records
features.notes: Available only once per policy period, after exhaustion of limit of coverage, for that particular RTA hospitalization only. Not for daycare. Impacts cumulative bonus

features.feature_name: New Born Baby Coverage - Gold Plan
features.coverage_limit: 10% of Basic Sum Insured or Rs.50,000, whichever less
features.coverage_details: Coverage starts from 16th day after birth till policy expiry, if mother insured continuously for 12 months without break
features.notes: Intimation and policy endorsement required. Exclusion Code Excl 03 not applicable for newborn. All other terms apply

patient_care.coverage_limit: Rs.400 per day for up to 5 days per occurrence and 14 days per policy period
patient_care.eligibility: Insured persons above 60 years of age
patient_care.coverage_details: Cost of engaging one attendant at residence after discharge if recommended by physician
patient_care.notes: No payment for first day. Requires valid hospitalization claim. Available with additional premium

hospital_cash.coverage_limit: Rs.1,000 per completed day, max 7 days per hospitalization and 14 days per policy period
hospital_cash.coverage_details: Cash benefit for each completed day of hospitalization
hospital_cash.notes: Admission and discharge days not counted. Not payable for physiotherapy or epidemic. Requires valid hospitalization claim. Available with additional premium

exclusions.description: Expenses related to treatment of Pre-Existing Disease and its direct complications excluded until expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage
exclusions.exception_conditions: Coverage after 36 months subject to declaration at application and acceptance by insurer. Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability.

exclusions.exclusion_name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period - Code Excl 02
exclusions.description: 24 months continuous coverage waiting period for specified diseases/surgeries/treatments
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for claims arising due to accident. Longer of two waiting periods applies if also covered under PED waiting. Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability.

exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment of any illness within 30 days from first policy commencement excluded
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months. Not applicable to enhanced sum insured.

exclusions.description: Expenses for admission primarily for diagnostics and evaluation purposes only. Diagnostic expenses not related or incidental to current diagnosis and treatment

exclusions.exclusion_name: Rest Cure, Rehabilitation and Respite Care - Code Excl 05
exclusions.description: Expenses for admission primarily for enforced bed rest, custodial care, and services for terminally ill
Surgical treatment of obesity excluded unless specific conditions met
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if: conducted upon doctor's advice, supported by clinical protocols, member 18+ years, BMI ≥40 or ≥35 with severe co-morbidities (obesity-related cardiomyopathy, coronary heart disease, severe sleep apnea, uncontrolled Type2 Diabetes) after failure of less invasive methods

exclusions.description: Any treatment including surgical management to change characteristics of body to opposite sex

exclusions.exclusion_name: Cosmetic or Plastic Surgery - Code Excl 08
exclusions.description: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or treatment to change appearance
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if for reconstruction following Accident, Burns or Cancer, or as part of medically necessary treatment to remove direct and immediate health risk (must be certified by attending Medical Practitioner)

exclusions.exclusion_name: Hazardous or Adventure Sports - Code Excl 09
exclusions.description: Treatment necessitated due to participation as professional in hazardous/adventure sports
Treatment arising from insured committing or attempting to commit breach of law with criminal intent
Treatment in hospitals or by providers specifically excluded by insurer and disclosed on website/notified to policyholders
exclusions.exception_conditions: In life threatening situations or following accident, expenses up to stabilization stage payable but not complete claim

exclusions.description: Treatment for alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition and consequences thereof

exclusions.exclusion_name: Health Hydros, Nature Cure Clinics, Spas - Code Excl 13
exclusions.description: Treatments in health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas or similar establishments or private beds attached to such establishments or admission for domestic reasons
Dietary supplements and substances purchasable without prescription, including vitamins, minerals and organic substances
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if prescribed by medical practitioner as part of hospitalization claim or day care procedure

exclusions.description: Treatment for correction of eye sight due to refractive error less than 7.5 dioptres
Any unproven treatment, services and supplies lacking significant medical documentation to support effectiveness
Any type of contraception, sterilization, assisted reproduction services (IVF, ZIFT, GIFT, ICSI), gestational surrogacy, reversal of sterilization
Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections), miscarriage and lawful medical termination of pregnancy
Circumcision, Preputioplasty, Frenuloplasty, Preputial Dilatation and Removal of SMEGMA
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if necessary for treatment of disease not excluded or necessitated due to accident

exclusions.description: Congenital External Condition/Defects/Anomalies
Convalescence, general debility, run-down condition, nutritional deficiency states
Intentional self-injury
Injury/disease caused by or arising from war, invasion, act of foreign enemy, warlike operations
Injury or disease caused by or contributed to by nuclear weapons/materials

Enhanced External Counter Pulsation Therapy, Chelation therapy, Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy, Rotational Field Quantum Magnetic Resonance Therapy, VAX-D, Low level laser therapy, Photodynamic therapy and similar therapies
Unconventional, Untested, Experimental therapies
Autologous derived Stromal vascular fraction, Chondrocyte Implantation, Procedures using Platelet Rich plasma and Intra articular injection therapy
Biologicals
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered when administered as in-patient, when clinically indicated and hospitalization warranted

exclusions.description: Inoculation or Vaccination
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered for post-bite treatment and for medical treatment for therapeutic reasons

exclusions.description: Hospital registration charges, admission charges, record charges, telephone charges and such other charges

exclusions.exclusion_name: Medical Devices and Aids - Code Excl 35
exclusions.description: Cost of spectacles and contact lens, hearing aids, Cochlear implants and procedures, walkers and crutches, wheelchairs, CPAP, BIPAP, Continuous Ambulatory Peritoneal Dialysis, infusion pump and similar aids
Any hospitalization which are not medically necessary/does not warrant hospitalization
Other Excluded Expenses as detailed in website www.starhealth.in
Existing disease/s, disclosed by Insured and mentioned in policy schedule under Permanent Exclusion (based on Insured's consent)

waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months
Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Cataract and diseases of anterior and posterior chamber of Eye (other than retinal detachment), Diseases of ENT, Diseases related to Thyroid, Benign diseases of breast
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Subcutaneous Benign Lumps, Sebaceous cyst, Dermoid cyst, Mucous cyst lip/cheek, Carpal Tunnel Syndrome, Trigger Finger, Lipoma, Neurofibroma, Fibroadenoma, Ganglion and similar pathology
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments for Diseases related to Tendon, Ligament, Fascia, Bones and Joint including Arthroscopy and Arthroplasty/Joint Replacement (other than caused by accident)
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All types of treatment for Degenerative disc and Vertebral diseases including Replacement of bones and joints and Degenerative diseases of Musculo-skeletal system, Prolapse of Intervertebral Disc (other than caused by accident)
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments related to Hepato-pancreato-biliary diseases including Gall bladder and Pancreatic calculi. All types of management for Kidney and Genitourinary tract calculi
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability
Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Desmoid Tumor, Umbilical Granuloma, Umbilical Sinus, Umbilical Fistula
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments related to all Diseases of Cervix, Uterus, Fallopian tubes, Ovaries, Uterine Bleeding, Pelvic Inflammatory Diseases
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All Diseases of Prostate, Stricture Urethra, all Obstructive Uropathies
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Benign Tumours of Epididymis, Spermatocele, Varicocele, Hydrocele
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Fistula, Fissure in Ano, Hemorrhoids, Pilonidal Sinus and Fistula, Rectal Prolapse, Stress Incontinence
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability
Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All types of transplant and related surgeries
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability
Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

Rs.30,000 per eye, max Rs.40,000 per person per policy period
Rs.750 per hospitalization, overall limit Rs.1,500 per policy period

sub_limits.description: Sublimits including pre and post hosp. Varies by SI: Rs.5,000 (1.5L), Rs.10,000 (2L), Rs.15,000 (3L), Rs.40,000 (4L), Rs.50,000 (5L), Rs.1,00,000 (10L), Rs.1,25,000 (15L)

sub_limits.description: Up to Sum Insured for all SI levels

sub_limits.description: Robotic surgeries covered within sublimits shown in policy

Rs.40,000 per eye, max Rs.50,000 per person per policy period

copay_conditions.description: 10% co-payment on each and every claim for insured persons whose age at time of entry is 61 years and above. Does not apply to those who entered before 61 and renew continuously

base_plan.notes: Reduces at same rate if claim made

gold_plan.accrual_rate: 25% in 2nd year, additional 20% each subsequent year
gold_plan.notes: Reduces at same rate if claim made

automatic_restoration.conditions: Available upon exhaustion of limit of coverage. Can be used only for unrelated illness/disease. Cannot be carried forward. Not available for Modern Treatment

super_restoration.conditions: Available upon exhaustion of limit of coverage. Can be used even for same illness/disease. Cannot be carried forward. Not available for Modern Treatment

moratorium_period.description: After 60 continuous months of coverage (including portability and migration), no policy/claim contestable except on grounds of established fraud
moratorium_period.applicable_to: First policy sum insured. For enhanced SI, 60 months from enhancement date on enhanced limits only

cashless.network_hospitals: Available in networked hospitals only. List at www.starhealth.in
documents_required: KYC (Identity proof with Address) as per AML Guidelines

claim_submission_time.hospitalization: Within 15 days from date of discharge
claim_submission_time.post_hospitalization: Within 15 days after completion of 60 days from discharge

documents_required: Pre Admission investigations and treatment papers
Cash receipts and reports for tests
Certificate from attending doctor regarding diagnosis
KYC (Identity proof with Address) as per AML Guidelines
NEFT documents (Customer name, Bank Account No., Name of Bank, IFSC code)

grace_period.coverage_during_grace: Yes, if premium paid in instalments during policy period

free_look_period.applicable_to: New individual policies only, not renewals or portability
free_look_period.refund_conditions: Refund of premium less medical examination expenses and stamp duty; or proportionate risk premium if risk commenced; or proportionate premium if part coverage commenced

renewal.conditions: Cannot be denied based on claims in preceding years. Request with premium must be received before policy end. Can be renewed within 30 days grace period. No loading based on individual claims experience

portability.notice_period: At least 30 days before, not earlier than 60 days from renewal date
portability.continuity_benefits: Accrued waiting period benefits transferred as per IRDAI guidelines

migration.notice_period: At least 30 days before renewal date
migration.continuity_benefits: Accrued waiting period benefits transferred as per IRDAI guidelines

cancellation.by_policyholder: 7 days written notice. Proportionate premium refund if policy ≤1 year and no claims. Premium refund for unexpired years if policy >1 year and risk not commenced
cancellation.by_insurer: 15 days written notice on grounds of misrepresentation, non-disclosure, fraud. No premium refund

policy_conditions.territorial_limit: All treatments must be taken in India

premium_payment.instalment_conditions: In event of claim, all subsequent premium instalments immediately become due and payable. Company can recover pending instalments from claim amount. No interest charged if instalment not paid on due date. Policy cancelled if instalment not paid within grace period

company_contact.address: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited, 4th Floor, Balaji Complex, No.15, Whites Lane, Whites Road, Royapettah, Chennai - 600014

family_package_plan.family_definition: Insured Person, spouse and dependent children not exceeding 2 in number
family_package_plan.sum_insured_allocation: Equally apportioned among all insured persons
conditions: Each family member covered up to his/her limit only
No transfer of unutilized balance to other insured persons
Health check-up benefit calculated on policy SI and equally divided
If member makes claim, not eligible for their share of health check-up benefit
Automatic restoration not applicable for this plan

subsumed_in_room_charges: Expenses related to prescription on discharge
subsumed_in_treatment_costs: Blood reservation charges and ante natal booking charges
Nutrition planning charges - Dietician charges - Diet charges
